raw_consumer_statement: I signed up for the Home Depot Credit Card which is apparently though Citibank. I was told by the rep ( XXXX ) in the Home Depot store when verbally agreeing to the credit card that it was zero interest for 6 months and I specifically asked if it was deferred interest and the rep said no that I would not be charged any deferred interest and interest wouldn't start accumulating until after the 6 months which turns out to be a lie. The reps are clearly incentivized to lie to customers and there's even something that says you get a free soda if they don't mention the home depot credit card as you are checking out and paying for your items. Even if I somehow signed somewhere agreeing to these terms the rep told me otherwise and that is grounds to dismiss these fees entirely.
